content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: NorthBridge Consulting
Customer ID: C010
Contract ID: K007
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: 90-Day Check-in
Date: June 4, 2023
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Patricia Wells (COO)

Sarah Chen: Patricia, three months in — how has the consulting team been finding it?

Patricia Wells: Better than expected, honestly. The offline sync was the main reason we switched and it's delivered. Our consultants travel constantly and the complaints about losing work or working off stale documents have basically stopped.

Sarah Chen: Really glad to hear that. How's adoption tracking?

Patricia Wells: 9 of 10 users are active. The tenth is a senior consultant who's semi-retired and works maybe two days a week. Not a concern.

Sarah Chen: Any friction?

Patricia Wells: Nothing major. A couple of consultants asked about integrating with our project management tool — we use Asana. Is there a native integration?

Sarah Chen: There's an API that allows Asana to be connected but no native one-click integration yet. I'll flag it as a request — I know it's come up before and it would be useful for a lot of our consulting clients.

Patricia Wells: Worth flagging. It's not blocking anything today but it would be a nice to have.

Sarah Chen: Noted. Patricia, I want to plant a seed — you mentioned you have 45 consultants. We're only covering 10 today. As the team sees the value, is a broader rollout something you'd consider?

Patricia Wells: Absolutely. If the senior consultants keep singing its praises, the conversation will happen naturally. Let's revisit in Q4.
